text:
Interesting idea.
• Feels a bit like AppleScript / Apple events scripting interface, but web apps? 
• Getting broad support might take more time than getting LLM:s to interact with real web apps?
• A bit similar to Semantic Web, too, but in a nice way a lot simpler.
• Could also think about creating polyfills for old web sites that support the API (and a way to add/find them).

text: Interested in hearing more about how you are using this. Are you working on a compiler right now?

elements.text: Interested in hearing more about how you are using this. Are you working on a compiler right now?

text: I am not using this atm. But I have long been pondering over to jump into this space. Creating my own language. This one poped up in one of my threads and since I plan on using LLVM I bookmarked it right away and then thought of FOC. I guessed many folks here could be interested in this one. A handy visualisation of LLVM IR can be pretty useful, IMHO.
